items.title_en: Microsoft's "Fix" for Windows 11: Flowers After the Beating
items.title_zh: 微软对 Windows 11 的“修复”：挨打后的花束
items.summary_en: Microsoft continues to roll out patches for Windows 11, but critics argue the changes are cosmetic and don't address core reliability or usability issues. The messaging resembles a post-incident PR sprint rather than substantive engineering fixes. For tech readers, this highlights the gap between marketing narratives and real-world OS quality in major updates.
items.summary_zh: 微软继续推出 Windows 11 的补丁，但批评者认为这些改动多为表面修补，无法解决核心的可靠性或可用性问题。外部宣传更像是事后公关冲刺，而非实质工程改进。对技术读者而言，这凸显了大型操作系统更新中营销叙述与实际软件质量之间的差距。

items.title_en: So where are all the AI apps?
items.title_zh: AI 应用到底在哪儿？
items.summary_en: Despite hype, consumer AI apps remain scarce. The piece analyzes bottlenecks like platform fragmentation, monetization hurdles, and tooling gaps, and sites where developers and platforms should focus to unlock broader AI software adoption.
items.summary_zh: 尽管热度高涨，面向消费者的 AI 应用仍不多。文章分析了平台碎片化、商业模式与工具链等瓶颈，并指出开发者和平台应聚焦的突破点以推动更广泛的 AI 应用普及。

items.title_en: LaGuardia pilots raised safety alarms months before deadly runway crash
items.title_zh: 拉瓜迪亚机场飞行员在致命跑道事故前数月发出安全警报
items.summary_en: LaGuardia pilots warned of safety concerns months before the fatal runway crash, suggesting deeper issues in safety culture or operational procedures. The disclosures highlight the ongoing risk-management challenges and may influence investigations or policy tweaks aimed at preventing similar incidents.
items.summary_zh: 拉瓜迪亚机场的飞行员数月前就提出安全隐患，暴露出安全文化、运行流程或设备方面的持续风险。相关披露提醒监管和运营方关注安全治理，可能推动调查与政策改进，防止类似悲剧再次发生。

items.title_en: Apple Business
items.title_zh: Apple Business：面向各规模企业的一体化平台
items.summary_en: Apple introduces Apple Business, an all-in-one platform to streamline device management, security, and app deployment for organizations of all sizes. By consolidating IT controls and enterprise workflows, it aims to reduce friction for Apple-powered ecosystems in the workplace. The move could reshape enterprise IT purchasing and cross-device collaboration strategies.
items.summary_zh: 苹果推出 Apple Business，一站式平台用于简化企业级设备管理、安全性与应用部署，覆盖各类规模的组织。通过整合 IT 控制和企业工作流，意在降低在工作场景中使用苹果设备的门槛。这一举措可能影响企业 IT 的采购决策及跨设备协作方式。

items.title_en: The AI Industry Is Lying to You
items.title_zh: AI 行业在欺骗你
items.summary_en: An opinion piece argues that hype around AI overstates capabilities and obscures risks, urging skepticism and demand for transparency, governance, and responsible deployment. It questions the marketing of AGI as imminent and calls for nuance in interpreting model performance and limitations.
items.summary_zh: 一篇观点文章认为对 AI 的宣传过于夸大能力、掩盖风险，呼吁保持怀疑态度、提升透明度、加强治理，并在部署时负责任地权衡。文章质疑将通用人工智能的实现过度渲染为近在眼前，并强调对模型性能与局限性的审慎解读。

items.title_en: No Terms. No Conditions
items.title_zh: 无条款、无条件
items.summary_en: A manifesto advocating permissive licensing with no terms or conditions, pushing for the broadest possible software reuse.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个倡导极致宽松许可、无条款、无条件使用的软件开源倡议，主张最大化软件再利用。

items.title_en: Country that put backdoors in Cisco routers to spy on world bans foreign routers
items.title_zh: 某国在思科路由器中植入后门以实施全球监视，现禁止进口外国路由器
items.summary_en: A country reportedly embedded backdoors in Cisco routers to facilitate surveillance and has banned foreign-made routers. The incident highlights geopolitical risk in critical infrastructure supply chains and underscores the need for hardened, trusted hardware and diversified sourcing.
items.summary_zh: 有报道称某国在思科路由器中植入后门以便进行监控，现禁止进口外国路由器。这一事件凸显关键基础设施供应链的地缘政治风险，并强调对更可信任的硬件与多元采购的需求。

items.title_en: Hypura – A storage-tier-aware LLM inference scheduler for Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: Hypura：面向 Apple Silicon 的存储层感知 LLM 推理调度器
items.summary_en: Hypura introduces a storage-tier-aware scheduler that optimizes LLM inference on Apple Silicon by factoring in where data lives (fast cache vs slower storage). By aligning memory, compute, and I/O, it can reduce latency and boost throughput for on-device AI workloads. This approach highlights how storage topology awareness can unlock more efficient AI on consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: Hypura 引入了一种面向存储层感知的推理调度器，在 Apple Silicon 上通过考虑数据所在的存储层次（高速缓存与较慢存储）来优化 LLM 推理。通过对齐内存、计算和 I/O，可以降低延迟、提升本地 AI 的吞吐量。这种做法凸显了存储拓扑感知在消费级硬件上提升 AI 效率的潜力。

items.title_en: ARM AGI CPU: Specs and SKUs
items.title_zh: ARM AGI CPU：规格与型号
items.summary_en: New details reveal SKUs and specifications for the ARM AGI CPU, outlining core counts, cache structure, memory bandwidth, and possible ISA extensions tailored for AI workloads. The lineup signals how Arm plans to balance performance, power, and software compatibility as AGI tasks scale across devices. For developers and OEMs, the specs map to anticipated optimization opportunities and ecosystem tooling.
items.summary_zh: ARM AGI CPU 的规格与型号清单曝光，涵盖核心数量、缓存结构、内存带宽，以及面向 AI 工作负载的 ISA 扩展等要点。该系列展示了 Arm 如何在 AI 任务大规模化时平衡性能、功耗与软件兼容性，便于开发者和原始设备制造商把握优化机会与生态工具链。

items.title_en: Arm AGI CPU
items.title_zh: Arm AGI CPU：面向通用人工智能的新一代处理器
items.summary_en: Arm unveils an AGI-oriented CPU design aimed at accelerating general AI workloads across edge and data-center scale. The architecture focuses on high-bandwidth memory, advanced vector math, and security features to support large models with lower power. This signals Arm's push to shape the AI compute ecosystem beyond accelerators, integrating AI-friendly cores into mainstream chips.
items.summary_zh: Arm 面向通用人工智能推出新一代 CPU 设计，意在在边缘和数据中心规模上加速通用 AI 工作负载。该架构强调高带宽内存、高级向量运算以及安全特性，以在更低功耗下支撑大模型。此举标志着 Arm 正在推动 AI 计算生态，不仅依赖加速器，也在主流芯片中整合对 AI 友好的核心。

items.title_en: LiteLLM Python package compromised by supply-chain attack
items.title_zh: LiteLLM Python 包遭供应链攻击
items.summary_en: A supply-chain attack compromised the LiteLLM Python package, potentially injecting malicious code into downstream deployments. It highlights how reliance on third-party dependencies amplifies risk, and stresses the importance of integrity checks, signed builds, and timely upgrades.
items.summary_zh: LiteLLM 的 Python 包遭遇供应链攻击，可能在下游部署中引入恶意代码。该事件凸显了依赖第三方包带来的风险，以及进行完整性校验、签名构建和及时升级的重要性。

items.title_en: Hypothesis, Antithesis, synthesis
items.title_zh: Hypothesis、对立、综合
items.summary_en: The piece revisits Hegelian dialectics, framing problem-solving as a dynamic progression from thesis to antithesis and ultimately synthesis. It argues that embracing tension between ideas can drive deeper solutions in tech design, policy, and philosophy rather than chasing binary outcomes. The takeaway is to cultivate iterative refinement rather than one-off conclusions.
items.summary_zh: 本文重新梳理黑格尔辩证法，将问题解决描述为从假设到对立再到综合的动态过程。它主张在技术设计、政策制定与哲学领域拥抱思想张力，避免简单二元对立，以推动更深层次的解决方案。要点是强调迭代完善而非一次性结论。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gemini can now natively embed video, so I built sub-second video search
items.title_zh: Gemini 现可原生嵌入视频，我实现了亚秒级视频搜索
items.summary_en: Gemini now supports native video embedding, enabling richer media integration in AI workflows. The author built a fast video search system leveraging embeddings to index video frames and transcripts, achieving sub-second lookup. This demonstrates how client-side media capabilities can enable near-instant content discovery.
items.summary_zh: Gemini 现已原生支持嵌入视频，方便在 AI 流程中整合多媒体。作者基于嵌入向量构建了视频搜索系统，对视频帧与文字转写进行索引，实现亚秒级检索，展示了前端对多媒体内容进行近乎即时检索的潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Email.md – Markdown to responsive, email-safe HTML
items.title_zh: Email.md：将 Markdown 转换为响应式、邮件安全的 HTML
items.summary_en: Email.md provides a conversion tool turning Markdown into HTML that renders consistently across email clients. It tackles email-inbox quirks like inlined styles and tables for layout, enabling safer, more reliable newsletters and transactional messages. For developers, it's a time-saver when shipping marketing emails.
items.summary_zh: Email.md 提供一种将 Markdown 转换为在各大邮件客户端中呈现一致的 HTML 的工具。它解决了邮件客户端对样式内联、表格布局等的限制造成的问题，从而让新闻简报与交易邮件变得更安全、可靠。对开发者来说，是发布邮件内容时的省时工具。

items.title_en: Wine 11 rewrites how Linux runs Windows games at kernel with massive speed gains
items.title_zh: Wine 11：在内核层重写以显著提升 Linux 上运行 Windows 游戏的速度
items.summary_en: Wine 11 overhauls kernel interactions to accelerate Windows games on Linux, delivering substantial speedups; it improves compatibility and reduces overhead in system calls translation and graphics handling. This move tightens the gap between Linux gaming and Windows performance, potentially expanding Linux gaming adoption.
items.summary_zh: Wine 11 对内核层进行重写，使 Linux 上运行 Windows 游戏的性能显著提升，并提高了兼容性与系统调用翻译、图形处理的效率。此举缩小了 Linux 与 Windows 在游戏性能上的差距，有望推动 Linux 游戏生态的扩展。

items.title_en: Missile Defense Is NP-Complete
items.title_zh: 导弹防御是 NP 完全问题
items.summary_en: The post argues that certain missile defense planning problems are NP-complete, implying intrinsic computational limits for optimal real-time solutions. The takeaway is that heuristics and approximations remain essential in defense system design.
items.summary_zh: 文中指出某些导弹防御规划问题属于 NP 完全，暗示在实时求解中存在本质的计算极限。结论是，在防御系统设计中仍需依赖启发式与近似方法。

items.title_en: WolfGuard: WireGuard with FIPS 140-3 cryptography
items.title_zh: WolfGuard：带 FIPS 140‑3 加密的 WireGuard
items.summary_en: WolfGuard is a WireGuard-focused project that implements FIPS 140-3 cryptography, aligning VPN tech with government-grade security standards. This makes it appealing for regulated industries or sensitive deployments, though it may come with certification overhead and potential compatibility considerations with standard WireGuard deployments.
items.summary_zh: WolfGuard 是一个聚焦于 WireGuard 的项目，实现了 FIPS 140-3 加密，确保 VPN 技术符合政府等级的安全标准。对合规行业或敏感部署具有吸引力，但可能伴随认证成本和与常规 WireGuard 部署的兼容性挑战。

items.title_en: Ripgrep is faster than grep, ag, git grep, ucg, pt, sift (2016)
items.title_zh: Ripgrep 比 grep、ag、git grep、ucg、pt、sift 更快
items.summary_en: A 2016 comparison shows Ripgrep outperforms traditional search tools on large codebases thanks to Rust-based internals and smarter regex handling. It helped popularize fast, developer-friendly search in modern toolchains.
items.summary_zh: 2016 年的比较显示 Ripgrep 在大型代码库中明显快于 grep、ag、git grep 等工具，得益于 Rust 实现和更高效的正则处理。这推动了现代工具链对快速搜索的追求。

items.title_en: NanoClaw Adopts OneCLI Agent Vault
items.title_zh: NanoClaw 采用 OneCLI Agent Vault
items.summary_en: NanoClaw integrates OneCLI Agent Vault to manage secrets for CLI agents, boosting security and ease of rotation across workflows. Signals growing emphasis on centralized secret management for developer tools.
items.summary_zh: NanoClaw 将 OneCLI Agent Vault 集成到工作流中，以安全地管理 CLI 代理凭证并简化轮换，体现对集中化凭证管理的重视。

items.title_en: Nanobrew: The fastest macOS package manager compatible with brew
items.title_zh: Nanobrew：与 brew 兼容的最快 macOS 包管理器
items.summary_en: Nanobrew promises blazing-fast package installs on macOS while staying fully compatible with Homebrew formulae, reducing install times without forking the ecosystem. It targets developers who want speed with seamless compatibility.
items.summary_zh: Nanobrew 声称在 macOS 上实现最快的包安装速度，同时与 Homebrew 公式完全兼容，避免分叉生态。面向追求高效开发的用户。

items.title_en: Debunking Zswap and Zram Myths
items.title_zh: 破解 Zswap 与 Zram 的误区
items.summary_en: The article dispels common myths about Zswap and Zram, clarifying their roles in swap and compressed RAM, and giving practical guidance on when each is beneficial and how to configure them.
items.summary_zh: 文章澄清了关于 Zswap 与 Zram 的常见误解，解释它们在内存管理中的作用，并给出在不同工作负载下的选用建议与配置要点。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised
items.title_zh: Litellm 1.82.7 与 1.82.8 在 PyPI 上遭篡改
items.summary_en: Two releases of a lightweight LLM client package were compromised on PyPI, enabling malicious code pushes to downstream users. The incident underscores supply-chain risk in Python ecosystems and the importance of checksum validation and pinning versions. Users should audit dependencies, upgrade to clean builds, and verify package integrity.
items.summary_zh: 两个版本的轻量级 LLM 客户端包在 PyPI 的发布被篡改，导致后续用户可能被注入恶意代码。事件凸显 Python 生态的供应链风险，强调校验和版本锁定的重要性。请审计依赖、升级到干净的构建版本，并验证包的完整性。

items.title_en: Claude Code Cheat Sheet
items.title_zh: 可打印的 Claude Code 快速参考表（每日自动更新）
items.summary_en: A printable Claude Code cheat sheet that auto-updates daily, serving as a handy quick-reference for prompts, patterns, and tips when coding with Claude. It's a lightweight, always-current resource for frequent Claude Code users.
items.summary_zh: 一份可打印的 Claude Code 快速参考表每日自动更新，提供提示语、常用模式和编码技巧，便于在使用 Claude 编码时快速查阅。该资源保持最新，适合高频使用者。

items.title_en: Log File Viewer for the Terminal
items.title_zh: 终端日志查看器
items.summary_en: lnav is a powerful terminal-based log viewer that aggregates and parses multiple log formats, offering fast search, color highlighting, and time-based filtering. It makes triaging issues across services easier by providing structured views and cross-reference across files without leaving the terminal.
items.summary_zh: lnav 是一个强大的终端日志查看工具，能聚合并解析多种日志格式，支持快速搜索、颜色高亮和基于时间的过滤。它通过在同一界面中跨文件浏览和关联信息，简化了跨服务的问题排查与调试。

items.title_en: curl > /dev/sda: How I made a Linux distro that runs wget | dd
items.title_zh: curl > /dev/sda：我如何做出能跑 wget | dd 的 Linux 发行版
items.summary_en: A provocative demonstration of bootstrapping a Linux distro by using curl to write to /dev/sda and dd, highlighting the fragility of ad-hoc bootstrap workflows and the need for verifiable images and secure boot.
items.summary_zh: 通过 curl 将输出写入 /dev/sda 再结合 dd，展示了用网络自举一个 Linux 发行版的极端做法，暴露了引导链的脆弱性。强调镜像签名与安全启动在实际部署中的重要性。

items.title_en: Opera: Rewind The Web to 1996 (Opera at 30)
items.title_zh: Opera：让网络回到1996年（Opera 三十周年）
items.summary_en: Opera's 30th anniversary piece reflects on the browser's early innovations—speed dial, compression, and lightweight features—and how they shaped today’s UX. It draws lessons for building lean, privacy-conscious, feature-rich browsers.
items.summary_zh: Opera 三十周年纪念文章回顾了早期创新（如速度拨号、压缩等）如何影响现代网页体验，并提出面向轻量、隐私友好但功能丰富浏览器的启示。

items.title_en: FCC updates covered list to include foreign-made consumer routers
items.title_zh: FCC 将外国制造的消费路由器纳入覆盖清单
items.summary_en: The FCC expands the Covered Equipment list to include foreign-made consumer routers, tightening security requirements for home networking gear sold in the U.S. The move could affect manufacturers, supply chains, and consumer privacy as compliance costs become clearer.
items.summary_zh: FCC 将外国制造的消费路由器纳入覆盖清单，强化对美国市场网络设备的安全要求。此举可能影响厂商、供应链与合规成本，进而关系到家庭网络的隐私与安全。

items.title_en: Secure Domain Name System (DNS) Deployment 2026 Guide [pdf]
items.title_zh: 安全 DNS 部署 2026 指南（PDF）
items.summary_en: A comprehensive guide from NIST on deploying secure DNS technologies (DNSSEC, DoT/DoH) and operational practices for resilience. It serves as a practical reference for enterprises and public networks.
items.summary_zh: NIST 发布的 2026 年 DNS 部署指南涵盖 DNSSEC、DoT/DoH 及运维最佳实践，面向企业与公共网络提供可操作的韧性参考。

items.title_en: iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM
items.title_zh: iPhone 17 Pro 展示本地运行 400B 参数的 LLM
items.summary_en: An iPhone 17 Pro demonstration shows a 400-billion-parameter LLM running locally on-device, signaling advances in edge AI and privacy-preserving inference. The feat highlights model compression, efficient on-device runtimes, and the potential shift away from cloud-only AI.
items.summary_zh: 一段演示显示 iPhone 17 Pro 能在本地设备上运行 400B 参数的 LLM，标志边缘 AI 的进展与隐私保护推理能力。此成就凸显模型压缩、边缘运行效率的提升，以及 AI 由云端依赖向本地推理的潜在转变。

items.title_en: LLM Neuroanatomy II: Modern LLM Hacking and Hints of a Universal Language?
items.title_zh: LLM 神经解剖学 II：现代 LLM 黑箱与普遍语言的线索？
items.summary_en: A sequel examining how LLMs map to internal structures, discussing modern hacking techniques and whether model representations hint at a universal language across tasks.
items.summary_zh: 续篇探讨 LLM 的内部结构与表征，讨论现代黑箱入侵技巧，以及模型表示是否暗示在多任务间存在普遍语言的线索。

items.title_en: Palantir Will No Longer Profit Off of New Yorkers' Health Data
items.title_zh: Palantir 将不再从纽约市民的健康数据获利
items.summary_en: Palantir announces it will stop monetizing health data from New York City hospitals, signaling a pivot toward privacy-conscious data practices and public relations improvement. The decision could influence how big data firms monetize public health data and set expectations for data custodians and city contracts.
items.summary_zh: Palantir 宣布将不再从纽约市医院的健康数据中获利，显示其向更注重隐私的数据实践和改进公关的方向转变。这一决定可能影响大型数据公司对公共健康数据的商业化模式，并对数据托管方与城市合同产生影响。

items.title_en: Epoch confirms GPT5.4 Pro solved a frontier math open problem
items.title_zh: Epoch 证实 GPT5.4 Pro 解决了一道前沿数学开放问题
items.summary_en: GPT5.4 Pro reportedly solved a frontier math open problem in Ramsey theory related to hypergraphs. The claim showcases AI's advancing capabilities in abstract reasoning, but independent verification and reproducibility remain crucial.
items.summary_zh: GPT5.4 Pro 据称解决了一道前沿数学开放问题，涉及 Ramsey 理论中的超图。此事展示了人工智能在高水平抽象推理方面的进步，但独立验证和复现仍然关键。

items.title_en: Young Graduates Face the Grimmest Job Market in Years
items.title_zh: 应届毕业生正面临近年来最严峻的求职市场
items.summary_en: New grads face a tougher job market with limited openings and slower hiring, particularly in tech.
items.summary_zh: 应届毕业生进入就业市场面临更严峻的机会和放缓的招聘需求，尤其在科技领域。文章指出起薪、职业路径将受影响，并强调通过提升技能和实习来弥合差距的重要性。

items.title_en: io_uring, libaio performance across Linux kernels and an unexpected IOMMU trap
items.title_zh: io_uring、libaio 在不同 Linux 内核的性能对比与意外的 IOMMU 陷阱
items.summary_en: The post analyzes performance of io_uring vs libaio across Linux kernel versions, noting improvements and a surprising IOMMU trap that affects certain workloads. It underscores evolving I/O APIs trade-offs and the importance of kernel version choice for latency-sensitive apps, storage stacks, and virtualization.
items.summary_zh: 文章比较了 io_uring 与 libaio 在不同 Linux 内核版本中的性能，指出性能改进同时暴露出某些工作负载会遇到的意外 IOMMU 陷阱。强调了 I/O API 的演变及对延迟敏感应用、存储栈和虚拟化的内核版本选择的重要性。

items.title_en: Autoresearch on an old research idea
items.title_zh: 对一个旧研究想法的自动化再研究
items.summary_en: Autoresearch on an old research idea revisits a long-standing question using modern tooling to gather data, test hypotheses, and track results. The piece offers practical lessons on automation, reproducibility, and how iterative, self-driven inquiry changes the pace of scientific exploration.
items.summary_zh: 本文展示了对一个长期存在的研究想法进行自动化再研究，借助现代工具进行数据收集、假设测试与结果跟踪。通过案例，讨论自动化、可重复性，以及自驱式研究如何改变科研的节奏。

items.title_en: Iranian strikes on Amazon data centers highlight industry's vulnerability
items.title_zh: 伊朗袭击亚马逊数据中心凸显行业脆弱性
items.summary_en: Reports of Iranian strikes on cloud provider data centers underscore the fragility of global infrastructure and the cascading risk to customers relying on cloud services. The incident spurs discussions on resilience, diversification of physical locations, and continual security hardening across the industry.
items.summary_zh: 关于伊朗对云服务商数据中心的袭击报道凸显全球基础设施的脆弱性及对云服务用户的连锁风险。此事件促使行业讨论韧性、物理地点分散以及持续的安全强化等议题。

items.title_en: US and TotalEnergies reach 'nearly $1B' deal to end offshore wind projects
items.title_zh: 美方与道达能源就终止海上风电项目达成近十亿美元协议
items.summary_en: The deal signals a retreat from several offshore wind projects in the US, with implications for climate goals, supply chains, and state/federal energy policy.
items.summary_zh: 这一达成为美方多项海上风电项目的终止铺平了道路，凸显清洁能源投资与项目推进中的风险与不确定性，对气候目标、供应链及能源政策具有深远影响。

items.title_en: Windows 3.1 tiled background .bmp archive
items.title_zh: Windows 3.1 瓦片背景 BMP 收藏集
items.summary_en: A GitHub collection preserves Windows 3.1 tiled background BMPs, offering a window into early PC UI artwork and nostalgia. The archive highlights limited color palettes and bitmap-based wallpapers from the era.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 收藏了 Windows 3.1 的瓷砖背景 BMP 文件，展示早期 PC UI 的美学与存储格式。该档案揭示了位图背景在当时对用户体验的影响。

items.title_en: GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability
items.title_zh: GitHub 的可用性似乎仅有 99.9%（三九），引发关注
items.summary_en: GitHub appears to be facing reliability issues despite being a core platform for developers, raising concerns about SLOs and uptime for massive code and CI pipelines. The outages stress the need for stronger resilience planning and incident response.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 作为开发者的核心平台，正面临可靠性问题，令大规模代码托管与持续集成流水线的可用性成为焦点。事件暴露出在弹性设计和应急响应方面的不足，强调需要更强的容错能力。

items.title_en: How I'm Productive with Claude Code
items.title_zh: 我如何用 Claude Code 提高生产力
items.summary_en: A personal take on working efficiently with Claude Code, sharing workflows, prompt templates, and practices that keep coding progress steady while staying focused.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享在 Claude Code 上保持高效工作的实际做法，包括工作流、提示模板和可持续的练习习惯，以在保持产出的同时保持专注。

items.title_en: Show HN: ProofShot – Give AI coding agents eyes to verify the UI they build
items.title_zh: Show HN: ProofShot – 让 AI 编码代理具备验证 UI 的能力
items.summary_en: ProofShot enables AI coding agents to inspect and verify the UI they generate, acting as a visual verifier for automated UI construction. This reduces misalignment between intended design and rendered output, accelerating trusted AI-driven UI workflows. It showcases a practical approach to injecting human-in-the-loop feedback into automated UI pipelines.
items.summary_zh: ProofShot 让 AI 编码代理能够检查并验证它们生成的 UI，作为对自动化 UI 构建的可视化校验工具。它减少了设计意图与最终呈现之间的错配，加速了 AI 驱动的 UI 工作流程中的信任建立。展示了将人类在环反馈引入自动化 UI 流程的实际方法。

items.title_en: PC Gamer recommends RSS readers in a 37mb article that just keeps downloading
items.title_zh: PC Gamer 在一篇 37MB 的文章中推荐 RSS 阅读器，但文稿似乎不断在下载
items.summary_en: PC Gamer curates a selection of RSS readers in a long, 37MB feature. The piece itself is unexpectedly download-heavy, turning a simple recommendation into a test of browser patience. The underlying takeaway is that enthusiasts still crave lightweight, dependable feed readers in an era of endless content.
items.summary_zh: PC Gamer 选出一批 RSS 阅读器的清单，但这篇 37MB 的文章本身却像在持续下载内容，考验浏览器耐心。文章透露在信息过载的时代，用户仍然需要轻量、可靠的订阅工具。

items.title_en: NASA to spend $20B on moon base after cancelling orbiting station
items.title_zh: NASA 将在取消轨道空间站后投资 200 亿美元建月球基地
items.summary_en: NASA pivots from an orbital research station to funding a lunar base, allocating about $20 billion to establish a sustained presence on the Moon. The shift signals a long-term commitment to deep-space infrastructure, public-private partnerships, and new mission architectures beyond LEO.
items.summary_zh: 美国宇航局将从取消轨道空间站的计划转向在月球建基地，投入约200亿美元以建立持续的月球存在。此举表明对深空基础设施的长期承诺，以及对公私伙伴关系和超地球轨道任务的新架构。

items.title_en: March, 19-21: God is a comedian
items.title_zh: 三月十九至二十一日：上帝是个喜剧演员
items.summary_en: A Substack essay blending humor and philosophy, using the idea that 'God is a comedian' to frame observations about life in tech and society.
items.summary_zh: 一篇 Substack 随笔，融合幽默与哲思，以“上帝是个喜剧演员”为线索，撷取科技与社会生活的观察。

items.title_en: Atomic Display Switching: Solving
items.title_zh: 原子显示切换：解决方案
items.summary_en: Atomic Display Switching presents a method to switch display outputs without partially updating frames, eliminating flicker during transitions. The solution improves multi-monitor setups, VNC/remote desktops, and hot-plug scenarios, offering a robust approach to display management.
items.summary_zh: Atomic Display Switching 提出了一种原子切换显示输出的方法，避免切换过程中出现帧的闪烁。该方案改善多显示器环境、远程桌面/虚拟桌面场景下的显示稳定性，提供了更可靠的显示管理方案。

items.title_en: Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia
items.title_zh: 拉瓜迪亚机场飞机与地面车辆相撞致两名飞行员遇难
items.summary_en: Two pilots died after a collision between an aircraft and a ground vehicle at LaGuardia. The incident spotlights airport surface safety and the need for robust protocols and automation to prevent such tragedies.
items.summary_zh: 拉瓜迪亚机场发生飞机与地面车辆相撞，造成两名飞行员死亡。事件凸显机场地面安全与防止此类事故的流程与自动化的重要性。

items.title_en: Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run
items.title_zh: LocalStack 将仓库归档，运行需账户
items.summary_en: LocalStack has archived its GitHub repository and now requires you to sign in to run the software locally. This marks a shift from open development toward a gated model, potentially affecting developers who rely on a free, self-hosted AWS-like environment. The move invites questions about accessibility and sustainability of community-focused open-source projects.
items.summary_zh: LocalStack 已将其 GitHub 仓库归档，现在运行需要账户登录。这标志着从开放开发向受限访问的转变，可能影响依赖免费本地 AWS 模拟环境的开发者。此举也引发关于社区开源项目可访问性与可持续性的讨论。

items.title_en: An incoherent Rust
items.title_zh: 不连贯的 Rust
items.summary_en: A critical look at Rust rhetoric and design choices, arguing that some aspects lack coherence and hinder learning. The post suggests clarifying mental models and aligning APIs to improve consistency.
items.summary_zh: 本文批判性评估 Rust 的表述与设计选择，认为某些方面缺乏连贯性，影响学习曲线。作者提出在设计上应明确思维模型并让 API 更加一致。

items.title_en: Box of Secrets: Discreetly modding an apartment intercom to work with Apple Home
items.title_zh: 秘密盒：低调改造公寓对讲机以接入 Apple Home
items.summary_en: A discreet retrofit of a standalone apartment intercom to integrate with Apple HomeKit enables automations and remote control without replacing the entire system.
items.summary_zh: 本文记录了如何低调为公寓对讲机做改造，使其能接入 Apple HomeKit，从而在家庭自动化中实现通过 Home.app 的控制与场景触发。强调在利用现有设备构建生态时需要关注安全、稳定性以及对硬件的潜在风险和保修影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Cq – Stack Overflow for AI coding agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：Cq——AI 编码代理的 Stack Overflow
items.summary_en: Show HN introduces Cq, pitched as Stack Overflow for AI coding agents. It aims to centralize code Q&A for AI copilots, potentially accelerating development and sharing best practices.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍 Cq，被称为 AI 编码代理的 Stack Overflow。它为 AI 代码代理提供问答与知识库，帮助开发者共享工具、模式与经验教训，可能提升协作效率。

items.title_en: I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop
items.title_zh: 我为修车店搭建了 AI 接待员
items.summary_en: A DIY AI receptionist automates front-desk tasks for a small mechanic shop, handling inquiries and scheduling. It demonstrates practical deployment of AI in small businesses and raises questions about privacy, reliability, and integration.
items.summary_zh: 一个自制项目为小型修车店打造了 AI 接待员，负责前台问询与排程。展示了 AI 在小企业中的实际应用，同时引发隐私、可靠性与集成方面的讨论。

items.title_en: A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp
items.title_zh: 一款受 Winamp 启发的复古终端音乐播放器
items.summary_en: A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp demonstrates a nostalgic UI in a command-line app. It highlights how simple interfaces can deliver enjoyable media experiences without desktop GUI.
items.summary_zh: 一款受 Winamp 启发的复古终端音乐播放器，展示了命令行界面也能提供怀旧且愉悦的媒体体验。

items.title_en: IRIX 3dfx Voodoo driver and glide2x IRIX port
items.title_zh: IRIX 系统上对 3dfx Voodoo 的 Glide 驱动与 Glide2x 的 IRIX 端口
items.summary_en: A port brings the Glide driver and Glide2x support to IRIX for the Voodoo graphics setup. The project demonstrates retro-graphics nostalgia and the persistence of open-source efforts to preserve legacy hardware.
items.summary_zh: IRIX 系统将承载 3dfx Voodoo 的 Glide 驱动与 Glide2x 的 IRIX 端口，重现经典显卡在旧系统上的运行。此举体现了对遗留硬件的热情与开源社区的保留工作。

items.title_en: The Resolv hack: How one compromised key printed $23M
items.title_zh: Resolv 黑客：单一被妥协的密钥如何打印出2300万美元
items.summary_en: The Resolv hack shows how a single compromised signing key enabled the attacker to move 23 million dollars in crypto, underscoring the critical importance of key management and secure signing in crypto ecosystems. The post outlines breach vectors and lessons for custodial and multi-sig setups.
items.summary_zh: Resolv 黑客事件显示，一把被妥协的签名密钥让攻击者获得了2300万美元的加密资产，凸显密钥管理和托管方案的关键性。文中梳理了入侵过程与对多签/托管体系的教训。

items.title_en: I created my first AI-assisted pull request
items.title_zh: 我创建了我的第一份 AI 辅助的拉取请求
items.summary_en: I created my first AI-assisted pull request, sharing practical experience with AI-assisted coding workflows.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享了自己的第一份 AI 辅助的拉取请求，讨论 AI 助力下的编码工作流的效率与潜在的质量控制问题。

items.title_en: Sunsetting the Techempower Framework Benchmarks
items.title_zh: 停用 Techempower 框架基准
items.summary_en: The Techempower Framework Benchmarks project is being sunset, ending active maintenance and updates. The move reflects the ongoing maintenance burden and evolving ecosystems, nudging developers to rely on maintained benchmarks or run their own tests while retaining historical performance insights.
items.summary_zh: Techempower 框架基准项目将进入停止维护阶段，正式结束主动更新。此举反映出维护负担与生态变化的压力，促使开发者改为使用受维护的基准集或自行执行性能测试，同时保留历史性能快照作为参考。

items.title_en: America tells private firms to “hack back”
items.title_zh: 美国敦促私企对网络攻击者实施攻回
items.summary_en: The US urges private firms to hack back against cyber threats, a controversial stance that raises questions about legality, risk of collateral damage, and the need for coordinated defense.
items.summary_zh: 美国敦促私企对网络攻击者实施攻击回击的做法引发争议，涉及法律性、潜在的附带损害与需要协调防御的问题。

items.title_en: Cuba's Fragile Power Grid Finds a Powerful New Partner
items.title_zh: 古巴脆弱的电网找到强大新伙伴
items.summary_en: OilPrice reports that Cuba's fragile power grid is finding a powerful new partner, signaling shifts in energy diplomacy. The collaboration aims to bolster reliability, upgrade infrastructure, and accelerate diversification of energy sources, with implications for resilience and pricing on the island.
items.summary_zh: OilPrice 报道称古巴脆弱的电网迎来一个强大的新伙伴，标志着能源领域的话语权与投资格局正在发生变化。合作旨在提升电网可靠性、升级基础设施，并推动能源结构多元化，对当地供电稳定性、成本与韧性具有深远影响。

items.title_en: Designing AI for Disruptive Science
items.title_zh: 为颠覆性科学设计 AI
items.summary_en: Designing AI for Disruptive Science outlines how AI can accelerate scientific discovery, with design principles for AI agents operating in research contexts.
items.summary_zh: Designing AI for Disruptive Science 概述 AI 如何加速科学发现，并给出研究场景中 AI 代理的设计原则。

items.title_en: Microsoft blocks trick to unlock native NVMe driver, but workarounds still exist
items.title_zh: 微软阻止解锁本地 NVMe 驱动的技巧，但仍有替代方案
items.summary_en: Microsoft has blocked a registry-based trick that unlocked native NVMe driver performance on Windows 11, curbing unofficial optimization. Despite the block, enthusiasts have found workarounds—often riskier or unstable—highlighting ongoing tension between performance optimization and system integrity.
items.summary_zh: 微软已封锁一项通过注册表实现本地 NVMe 驱动性能提升的技巧，限制了非官方的性能优化。尽管被封堵，爱好者仍在寻找变通方法，这些方式往往伴随风险，凸显了性能追求与系统稳定性之间的博弈。

items.title_en: Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets
items.title_zh: Trivy 再度受攻击：GitHub Actions 标签广泛暴露密钥
items.summary_en: Trivy is again under fire after attackers exploited compromised GitHub Actions tags to steal secrets. The incident underscores how software supply chain tools can be weaponized through CI/CD workflows, prompting teams to pin trusted versions, audit action usage, and rotate leaked credentials.
items.summary_zh: Trivy 再次受攻击，攻击者利用被妥协的 GitHub Actions 标签窃取密钥。这凸显供应链工具在 CI/CD 流水线中的潜在攻击点，促使团队固定可信版本、审计 Actions 使用并轮换泄露的凭证。

items.title_en: I wrote a 750-page guide to self-hosting production apps
items.title_zh: 我写了一本750页的自托管生产应用指南
items.summary_en: A 750-page guide to self-hosting production apps lays out architecture, security, backups, and operational workflows for running services on self-hosted infrastructure. The work underscores ongoing interest in guardrails and autonomy in deployment.
items.summary_zh: 一份 750 页的自托管生产应用指南，系统讲述了在自托管基础设施上运行服务的架构、安保、备份和部署工作流，体现对自主部署的持续追求。

items.title_en: Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application
items.title_zh: Dune3d：一个参数化的3D CAD应用
items.summary_en: Dune3d is an open-source parametric 3D CAD project that lets users define and modify geometry with parameters and constraints. The project exemplifies how modular, scriptable CAD tooling could complement or challenge heavyweight CAD suites.
items.summary_zh: Dune3d 是一个开源的参数化3D CAD项目，允许通过参数和约束来定义和修改几何形状。该项目展示了轻量、可脚本化的 CAD 工具如何挑战主流工具并实现更快速的试验。

items.title_en: Show HN: The King Wen Permutation: [52, 10, 2]
items.title_zh: Show HN：王文卦置换：[52, 10, 2]
items.summary_en: Show HN presents a mathematical exploration of the King Wen permutation, using a simple triple [52, 10, 2] to illustrate a particular permutation in the I Ching framework. The project combines number theory with symbolic harmony, inviting readers to experiment with small seeds and observe emergent structure.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了王文卦置换的数学探讨，以简单的三元组 [52, 10, 2] 为例来揭示在易经框架下的特定排列。该项目把数论与象征意涵相结合，鼓励读者用小的种子进行实验，观察其中的结构与规律。

items.title_en: Digs: iOS app that syncs your Discogs collection and lets you browse it offline
items.title_zh: Digs：离线浏览 Discogs 收藏的 iOS 应用
items.summary_en: Digs provides offline access to your Discogs collection by syncing to an iOS app, enabling fast, private catalog browsing without a network.
items.summary_zh: Digs 是一款 iOS 应用，能将 Discogs 收藏同步并离线浏览，便于本地快速、私密地管理音乐藏品。

items.title_en: Outworked – An Open Source Office UI for Claude Code Agents
items.title_zh: Outworked：面向 Claude Code Agents 的开源办公 UI
items.summary_en: Outworked is an open-source Office UI designed to run Claude Code Agents, enabling users to orchestrate code-focused AI workflows inside familiar office apps. It demonstrates how open frontends can extend AI agents' capabilities for documentation, coding tasks, and automation with less vendor lock-in.
items.summary_zh: Outworked 是一个用于 Claude Code Agents 的开源办公界面，允许在熟悉的办公应用中协同处理代码相关的 AI 工作流。它展示了开放前端如何扩展 AI 代理的能力，用于文档编写、编码任务与自动化，从而降低对单一厂商的依赖。

items.title_en: Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website
items.title_zh: 沃尔玛：ChatGPT 结账转化率比官网低三倍
items.summary_en: A test of ChatGPT-powered checkout at a major retailer shows conversions were three times worse than the regular checkout flow. The result underscores that conversational AI must be carefully designed for shopping tasks to avoid frictions, even as AI promises convenience.
items.summary_zh: 在一家大型零售商的结账场景中，ChatGPT 驱动的结账流程的转化率比常规网站结账低三倍。该结果提醒零售商在引入对话式AI时，需要显式优化购物任务的流畅性，避免引入额外的操作摩擦。

items.title_en: Scott Hanselman says he's working on Windows local accounts
items.title_zh: Scott Hanselman 表示正在研究 Windows 本地账户
items.summary_en: Scott Hanselman teased work on Windows local accounts, hinting at reducing dependence on Microsoft accounts for sign-in and personalization. The exploration could enable offline or privacy-preserving user management and influence both consumer and enterprise workflows.
items.summary_zh: Scott Hanselman 表示正在研究改进 Windows 本地账户的方案，凸显减少对微软账户依赖、提升隐私与离线使用的探索。这一方向或将带来本地化的登录与个性化管理选项，并影响企业及普通用户的使用场景。

items.title_en: Ubisoft's death by a thousand cuts
items.title_zh: 育碧的千疮百孔之路
items.summary_en: An analytical take argues Ubisoft’s ongoing struggles stem from delayed releases, misaligned live-service strategies, and underperforming franchises. A series of organizational and strategic missteps appears to be eroding investor confidence and player enthusiasm as the publisher adapts to changing monetization models.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析育碧持续的艰难局面，称其源于产品延期、在线服务策略失配以及部分系列作品的低迷。多重组织与战略失误叠加，削弱了投资者信心和玩家热情，折射出传统大型游戏发行商在变革中的挑战。

items.title_en: Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²)
items.title_zh: 寻找所有正则匹配的时间复杂度一直是 O(n²)
items.summary_en: Finding all regex matches can deteriorate to quadratic time in worst cases, a long-standing performance pitfall in many engines. The post outlines why this problem persists and offers practical approaches to mitigate it in real-world use.
items.summary_zh: 在最坏情况下，寻找所有正则匹配的时间复杂度可能退化为平方级。本文解释了这一问题为何长期未被根本解决，并给出在实际场景中缓解的可操作方法。

items.title_en: Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs
items.title_zh: Bombadil：Antithesis 的网页 UI 属性测试工具
items.summary_en: Bombadil brings property-based testing to front-end UI testing, generating diverse interaction sequences to expose edge cases that example tests miss. It emphasizes automated shrinking of failing runs to minimal reproducing cases and integrates with common web stacks, helping teams catch flaky behavior before release.
items.summary_zh: Bombadil 为前端 UI 引入属性测试，通过自动生成各种交互序列来揭示常规测试难以覆盖的边界问题。它还能对失败用例进行最小化缩减，便于定位复现，并与主流前端栈对接，帮助团队在发布前发现易出错的行为。

items.title_en: Can you get root with only a cigarette lighter? (2024)
items.title_zh: 只用打火机就能拿到 root 吗？（2024）
items.summary_en: Researchers revisit a surprising hardware attack vector and show that a common cigarette lighter can act as a crude fault-injection tool to gain root access on a device. The write-up highlights how small, inexpensive hardware can create power transients or other disturbances that undermine security, underscoring the ongoing risk to embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: 研究者重新探讨了一个出人意料的硬件攻击路径，展示了常见打火机也可作为粗糙的故障注入工具，从而在某些设备上获得 root 权限。该文章强调廉价小型硬件也会造成电源瞬变等干扰，暴露嵌入式系统安全的脆弱性。

items.title_en: BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor
items.title_zh: BIO：Bao I/O 协处理器
items.summary_en: An in-depth look at the Bao I/O coprocessor, a tiny accelerator designed to offload I/O tasks and increase efficiency in embedded systems. It examines architecture choices, potential uses, and what such a dedicated co-processor could mean for hobbyist and professional hardware.
items.summary_zh: 对 Bao I/O 协处理器的深入解读，介绍其用于分担 I/O 任务、提升嵌入式系统性能与安全的设计思路。文章探讨架构选型、潜在应用，以及这类专用协处理器对硬件爱好者与专业领域的影响。

items.title_en: Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain
items.title_zh: Ju Ci：瓷器修复的艺术
items.summary_en: Ju Ci: The Art of Repairing Porcelain explores the craft of porcelain restoration, likely touching on traditional techniques and the philosophy of mending as an expressive art form.
items.summary_zh: Ju Ci：瓷器修复的艺术，探索修复的技巧与观念，将修复视为对历史的保留与美学表达。

items.title_en: Amazon says AWS' Bahrain region 'disrupted' following drone activity
items.title_zh: AWS 巴林区域在无人机活动后中断
items.summary_en: Amazon reports that its AWS Bahrain region experienced disruptions following drone activity, underscoring how external threats can ripple into cloud regions. The incident prompts upgraded monitoring, routing resilience, and faster incident response to improve regional reliability.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊表示，受无人机活动影响，AWS 巴林区域出现中断，凸显外部安全事件对云基础设施的潜在冲击。此事促使加强区域监控、容灾与事件响应能力，以提升云服务的鲁棒性。

items.title_en: An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf]
items.title_zh: 成为研究者的随手指南（PDF）
items.summary_en: An Unsolicited Guide to Being a Researcher offers practical, no-nonsense advice on conducting robust, ethical research, from formulating questions to documenting methods and sharing results. It emphasizes reproducibility, critical thinking, and the social dynamics of collaboration for lasting impact.
items.summary_zh: 这份《成为研究者的随手指南》给出务实、无废话的研究建议，覆盖从如何提出研究问题到记录方法、分享结果的全过程。强调可重复性、批判性思维，以及在协作和学术共同体中的伦理与责任，帮助研究者提升长期影响力。

items.title_en: MSA: Memory Sparse Attention
items.title_zh: MSA：记忆稀疏注意力
items.summary_en: MSA introduces memory-sparse attention to reduce memory and compute for long-context models, enabling scalable attention with less quadratic cost. This can impact how we design and train larger sequences.
items.summary_zh: MSA 提出记忆稀疏注意力，降低长上下文模型的内存与计算需求，使注意力计算更具可扩展性，或促使更大上下文的训练与推理。

items.title_en: BIO – The Bao I/O Co-Processor
items.title_zh: BIO：Bao I/O 协处理器
items.summary_en: Crowd Supply updates introduce BIO, a dedicated I/O co-processor for Bao hardware that handles GPIO and peripheral interfacing, offloading work from the main microcontroller. The design aims to boost performance, simplify firmware, and enable more deterministic timing for embedded projects, with potential power and responsiveness benefits.
items.summary_zh: Crowd Supply 的更新介绍了 BIO（Bao I/O 协处理器），它作为 Bao 硬件的专用 I/O 协处理器，承担 GPIO 及外设接口的处理，减轻主控芯片的负担。此设计旨在提升性能、简化固件并实现更确定性的时序，对嵌入式项目有潜在的功耗和响应优势。

items.title_en: Testing the Swift C compatibility with Raylib (+WASM)
items.title_zh: 用 Raylib 测试 Swift 与 C 的兼容性（含 WASM）
items.summary_en: It likely demonstrates building and running C/Raylib code from Swift, revealing practical tricks for cross-language game development and WASM deployment. A takeaway: cross-language bindings are feasible but require careful ABI attention.
items.summary_zh: 博文探讨了通过 Raylib 实现 Swift 与 C 的互操作性，并考虑 WebAssembly 的支持。它展示了从 Swift 构建/运行 Raylib 的 C 代码的实践技巧，凸显跨语言游戏开发和 WASM 部署的可行性，同时提醒在 ABI 级别需要留意。

items.title_en: Power consumption of Game Boy flash cartridges (2021)
items.title_zh: Game Boy 闪存卡的功耗（2021 年）
items.summary_en: An empirical look at how much power modern Game Boy flash cartridges draw and how this affects battery life. By comparing different cartridge designs, the piece provides practical insights for retro-gaming longevity and hardware power budgeting.
items.summary_zh: 本文对现代 Game Boy 闪存卡的实际功耗进行了测量与对比，讨论它们对老任天堂掌机电池续航的影响。通过比较不同卡带设计，给爱好者在火力续航与硬件功耗预算方面提供实用参考。

items.title_en: Abusing Customizable Selects
items.title_zh: 滥用可定制的下拉选择框
items.summary_en: An examination of how customizable select controls can be misused in web apps, highlighting potential accessibility and security pitfalls. It offers safer alternatives and practical patterns for building robust, accessible UI.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析了可自定义的下拉框控件在实现中的滥用风险，揭示了可访问性与安全性方面的潜在漏洞。它提供更安全的实现模式与实践范式，帮助开发者构建鲁棒且易访问的界面。

items.title_en: General Motors is assisting with the restoration of a rare EV1
items.title_zh: 通用汽车正在协助修复稀有的 EV1
items.summary_en: General Motors is helping restore the iconic 1990s EV1, highlighting renewed interest in historic electric vehicle tech. The collaboration underscores industry reverence for early EVs and potential lessons for modern electrification and preservation of automotive heritage.
items.summary_zh: 通用汽车正在协助修复标志性的1990年代 EV1，凸显业界对早期电动汽车技术的重新关注。该合作体现了对电动出行历史的尊重，也为现代电气化和汽车遗产保护带来启示。

items.title_en: Pompeii's battle scars linked to an ancient 'machine gun'
items.title_zh: Pompeii 的战斗伤痕与古代“机枪”相关
items.summary_en: Archaeologists link Pompeii's battle scars to an ancient rapid-fire weapon, a claim that is provocative but uncertain. If validated, it would rewrite what we know about Roman siege technology and the risks faced by the city.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家将庞贝城的战斗痕迹与古代快速发射武器相关联——尽管说法仍具争议。若相关结论成立，将改变人们对罗马战争技术的认识以及庞贝城在古代战争中的风险。

items.title_en: A 6502 disassembler with a TUI: A modern take on Regenerator
items.title_zh: 带 TUI 的 6502 反汇编器：Regenerator 的现代版本
items.summary_en: A modern Regenerator-inspired 6502 disassembler with a terminal UI, making retro reverse engineering approachable for hobbyists and researchers.
items.summary_zh: 受 Regenerator 启发的带有终端 UI 的 6502 反汇编器，为爱好者与研究者提供更易上手的复古逆向工程工具。

items.title_en: Data Manipulation in Clojure Compared to R and Python
items.title_zh: Clojure 数据处理：与 R 与 Python 的对比
items.summary_en: The article compares data manipulation ecosystems, highlighting Clojure's approach with functional pipelines versus R's data frames and Python's pandas/polars. It discusses expressiveness, composability, and performance trade-offs when doing data wrangling at scale, plus considerations for team skill sets and ecosystem maturity.
items.summary_zh: 文章比较了数据处理生态：Clojure 的函数式流水线方法与 R 的数据框和 Python 的 pandas/polars 的差异。讨论了表达力、组合性、以及大规模数据清洗的性能权衡，并就团队技能与生态成熟度给出思考。

items.title_en: No-build, no-NPM, SSR-first JavaScript framework if you hate React, love HTML
items.title_zh: 不构建、无 NPM、SSR 优先的 JavaScript 框架
items.summary_en: A new JavaScript framework markets itself as SSR-first, no-build, and no-NPM, aiming at HTML-first development and simple CDN-based deployments. It challenges conventional toolchains and promises lean, fast apps.
items.summary_zh: 一个新 JavaScript 框架以 SSR 为先、无需构建和 NPM 为卖点，面向 HTML 优先的开发场景与通过 CDN 部署的简化模式。对传统工具链构成挑战，承诺提供更轻量的应用体验。

items.title_en: Overcoming the Friendship Recession
items.title_zh: 应对友谊衰退
items.summary_en: Opinion piece on the decline of everyday social connections and practical tips to rebuild meaningful friendships in a digitally saturated era.
items.summary_zh: 对日常社交关系下降的观点性文章，给出在数字化高密度环境中重建有意义友谊的实用建议。

items.title_en: Gerd Faltings, who proved the Mordell conjecture, wins the Abel Prize
items.title_zh: 格尔德·法尔汀斯因证明莫德尔猜想荣获 Abel 奖
items.summary_en: Gerd Faltings solved the Mordell conjecture (Faltings' theorem), a milestone in number theory. The Abel Prize honors this landmark contribution, underscoring its lasting impact on arithmetic geometry and our understanding of rational points on curves.
items.summary_zh: 格尔德·法尔汀斯因证明莫德尔猜想而获得 Abel 奖，这是数论领域的里程碑。法尔汀斯的定理对理解有理点在高阶代数曲线上的分布具有深远影响，被公认为算术几何的重要里程碑。

items.title_en: TI-89 Height-Mapped Raycaster
items.title_zh: TI-89 高度映射光线投射器
items.summary_en: TI-89 Height-Mapped Raycaster documents a homebrew project that runs a height mapped raycaster on a vintage calculator. It showcases clever optimization and the enduring appeal of retro 3D rendering.
items.summary_zh: TI-89 高度映射光线投射器，展示在老式计算器上实现伪3D 渲染的自制项目。体现了对复古计算及边缘设备演示的持续兴趣。

items.title_en: I Quit Editing Photos
items.title_zh: 我不再编辑照片
items.summary_en: A personal essay about stepping back from manual photo editing, exploring how automation and AI tools affect creative control and time management.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享放弃手动图片编辑的决定，探讨自动化与 AI 工具对创作控制与时间管理的影响。

items.title_en: Tony Hoare and His Imprint on Computer Science
items.title_zh: 托尼·霍尔对计算机科学的影响
items.summary_en: The piece surveys Tony Hoare's lasting impact on CS, from formal methods like Hoare logic to concurrent programming via CSP and algorithms such as quicksort. It connects his ideas to modern software correctness, verification, and language design, illustrating how foundational theories shape practical systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理了托尼·霍尔对计算机科学的深远影响，包括霍尔逻辑、并发编程的 CSP 以及快速排序等算法。将他的思想与现代软件正确性、验证和语言设计联系起来，展示基础理论如何塑造实际系统。

items.title_en: Microservices and the First Law of Distributed Objects (2014)
items.title_zh: 微服务与分布式对象的第一定律（2014）
items.summary_en: Martin Fowler revisits the relationship between microservices and distributed objects, stressing explicit boundaries and asynchronous communication over naive remote method calls.
items.summary_zh: Martin Fowler 将分布式对象的思想与微服务联系起来，强调应以明确边界和异步通信来避免远程方法调用的陷阱。文章指出延迟、部分失败等问题，以及在规模化系统中维持清晰契约的重要性。

items.title_en: The Jellies That Evolved a Different Way to Keep Time
items.title_zh: 以另一种方式维持时间的水母进化
items.summary_en: A Quanta Magazine feature on jellyfish evolving a different way to keep time, illustrating diverse biological clocks and evolutionary solutions to timing problems.
items.summary_zh: 量子杂志报道了水母如何进化出不同的时间调控方式，呈现生物钟的多样性以及进化在时间编码问题上的不同解法。

items.title_en: How to use storytelling to fit inline assembly into Rust
items.title_zh: 如何用讲故事的方式将内联汇编融入 Rust
items.summary_en: A post explains a narrative approach to documenting and integrating inline assembly in Rust, balancing safety guarantees with low-level control. It provides concrete techniques for expressing unsafe segments clearly and maintaining compiler optimizations. The key takeaway is a practical pattern for ergonomic low-level Rust.
items.summary_zh: 博文以讲故事的方式讲解在 Rust 中嵌入内联汇编的实践，平衡安全性与底层控制。给出将不安全代码清晰表达和保持编译器优化的具体技巧，提供一种在 Rust 中优雅进行低级编程的实用模式。
